channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Banks, customs to stay partly open during Eid holidays
item.description:
Importance: 94.8 | Covered by: 9 feeds | Reputation: 9.6

Matched titles:
- Banks to stay shut for 7 days during Eid-ul-Azha
- Banks closed for 7 days during Eid
- Banks and finance companies to shut 25–31 May for Eid
- Govt declares 7-day Eid-ul-Azha holiday; offices open May 23–24 before break
- 7-day Eid closure for banks
- Banks to remain open on May 23-24 for Eid-related transactions
- Banks get weeklong holiday during Eid-ul-Azha
- Banks to remain closed for 7 consecutive days during Eid
- BB issues banking schedule for Eid-ul-Azha
- Eid-ul-Azha: Banks across Bangladesh to remain closed for seven consecutive days
- Banks to remain closed for 7 days during Eid; only some branches to stay open on 25, 26 May
